problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
